DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SHIWON CHOE, Esq. of the Office of the Attorney General of California (tel: 415-510-4400) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GAVIN NEWSOM IN HIS OFFICIAL CAPACITY AS GOVERNOR OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Gavin Newsom's demurrer to the complaint is sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. If plaintiff Suresh Kumar Mynam wishes to file a first amended complaint, he must do so no later than February 26, 2025 and must allege ultimate facts supporting at least one viable cause of action. In deciding whether to file a first amended complaint, the plaintiff should keep in mind that the Governor is not involved in the setting of San Francisco towing charges and likely lacks the authority to make changes to those charges.

Order submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
